ContextLayer.title: ContextLayer
ContextLayer.description: Active brain layer context that calibrates ASTRA's system instructions and style priorities.

id.description: Unique identifier of the context layer.

title.description: The human-readable title of this memory context layer.

description.description: The factual context snippet or style constraint injected into Gemini prompts.

updated.description: Relative elapsed time stamp indicating the last state mutation.

active.description: Whether this contextual brain vector is currently active and influencing synthesis.

LearnedInsight.title: LearnedInsight
LearnedInsight.description: Dynamically compiled, high-affinity semantic memories or preferences extracted from user telemetry.

id.description: Unique identifier of the learned insight.

title.description: The semantic summarization of the extracted wisdom.

content.description: The behavioral, design, or algorithmic insight text extracted from logs.

match.description: Confidence percentage scoring how strongly the user query correlates with this node.

type.description: The category classification, typically 'insight' or similar.

date.description: Full timestamp with date and time of formulation.

DeveloperKey.title: DeveloperKey
DeveloperKey.description: High-entropy, cryptographically masked API tokens for authorizing external workspaces.

name.description: User assigned label for identifying the key client.

scope.description: Defines access levels and permitted operations.

token.description: Symmetric representation of the authorization credential.

created.description: Date format string when token was instantiated.

/users/{userId}/contexts/{contextId}.description: Localized context adjustment parameters whitelisted under each client ID.

/users/{userId}/insights/{insightId}.description: Semantic memories harvested specifically from each developer's feedback loops.

/users/{userId}/developerKeys/{keyId}.description: Dynamic whitelist of simulated security tokens generated for user accounts.
